subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Glad-tidings, glad-tidings! For the lovers and they that are consumed with yearning have freely given their most precious possession [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبدالله البشاره البشاره بما انفق العشاق و اصحاب الاشتیاق اعز ما عندهم فی
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @Shrines and Holy places, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement
